title: As bitcoin, altcoin prices gain, derivatives signal skepticism over a sustained rally
summary: Analysts noted bitcoin is stuck between key support near $60,000 and resistance around $68,000, and a bearish chart pattern could send prices toward $54,000.

title: Bank of England backs down on strict stablecoin holding limits, sets $50 billion issuance cap
summary: The U.K. central bank abandons retail holding limits for a 40-billion-pound aggregate cap and sweetens yield terms for token issuers ahead of a 2027 market launch.

title: Geopolitical relief meets the Warsh Fed: Crypto Week Ahead
summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 22.

title: Taiko halts its Ethereum layer-2 network after a bridge exploit, token dives
summary: An attacker forged withdrawal proofs to drain about $1.7 million, the same type of flaw behind this year's biggest bridge hacks. Fast containment kept the damage small.

title: Bitcoin price may be headed to $54,000, says analyst who forecast October's all-time high
summary: Doctor Profit, a widely followed crypto analyst, says bitcoin is forming a “bear flag” pattern.
